'''bashuzu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:swainship|swainship]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-sh-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:swainship|swainship]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| bashuzu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæshizith|bæshizith]] || [[word:bæshizij|bæshizij]] || [[word:bæshizish|bæshizish]] || [[word:bæshizi|bæshizi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bashushuzuth|bashushuzuth]] || [[word:bashushuzuj|bashushuzuj]] || [[word:bashushuzush|bashushuzush]] || [[word:bashushuzu|bashushuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bashuzuth|bashuzuth]] || [[word:bashuzuj|bashuzuj]] || [[word:bashuzush|bashuzush]] || [[word:bashuzu|bashuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bashufzuth|bashufzuth]] || [[word:bashufzuj|bashufzuj]] || [[word:bashufzush|bashufzush]] || [[word:bashufzuf|bashufzuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bashuzuthu|bashuzuthu]] || [[word:bashuzuju|bashuzuju]] || [[word:bashuzushu|bashuzushu]] || [[word:bashuzuku|bashuzuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bashuzuth|bashuzuth]] || [[word:bashuzuj|bashuzuj]] || [[word:bashuzush|bashuzush]] || [[word:bashuzu|bashuzu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bashuzuthul|bashuzuthul]] || [[word:bashuzujul|bashuzujul]] || [[word:bashuzushul|bashuzushul]] || [[word:bashuzukul|bashuzukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bashuzuthuthu|bashuzuthuthu]] || [[word:bashuzujuju|bashuzujuju]] || [[word:bashuzushushu|bashuzushushu]] || [[word:bashuzuku|bashuzuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bashuzuthun|bashuzuthun]] || [[word:bashuzujun|bashuzujun]] || [[word:bashuzushun|bashuzushun]] || [[word:bashuzukun|bashuzukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bashuzuthuoro|bashuzuthuoro]] || [[word:bashuzujuoro|bashuzujuoro]] || [[word:bashuzushuoro|bashuzushuoro]] || [[word:bashuzukuoro|bashuzukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a249b1f}}
